Event: Royal Challenge - Season 34
Event Date: 01/02/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A192
Angler's Eye

Triggers: Every 2 sec

The unit casts a healing mark on the ally with the least current health (may cast it on themself) for 6 sec and restores 160000 health to that unit for 6 sec. A unit cannot have more than one healing mark.

Every 4 sec the unit deals 128000 pure damage to a random enemy and all enemies in a small radius around the target and reduces their damage by 25% for 3 sec. The artifact owner also restores health to all allies with healing marks equal to 40% of the damage dealt by that artifact ability.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
